heading: Standards for pipeline rates, classifications, through routes, rules, and practices
label: 15501 Standards for pipeline rates, classifications, through routes, rules, and practices
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10701 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10701 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Reasonableness
children.label: a .—Reasonableness
children.text: A rate, classification, rule, or practice related to transportation or service provided by a pipeline carrier subject to this part must be reasonable. A through route established by such a carrier must be reasonable.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: b .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: A pipeline carrier providing transportation subject to this part may not discriminate in its rates against a connecting line of any other pipeline, rail, or water carrier providing transportation subject to this subtitle or unreasonably discriminate against that line in the distribution of traffic that is not routed specifically by the shipper.
